data.title: Add External Dependencies Contradiction Gate to brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 2 Approval Gate
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Exemption
test-exempt: non-executable instruction file (brainstorm/SKILL.md) per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5 — static assets only / non-executable instruction files. Structural-boundary tests are in Task 1 (62f4-fe71). This task makes those RED tests pass.

## Implementation Notes
Add the External Dependencies Contradiction Gate sub-section to brainstorm SKILL.md's Phase 2 Step 4 (Approval Gate) section. This gate must run BEFORE the approval gate options are presented. The gate is flag-gated by planning.external_dependency_block_enabled.

### Insertion point
In plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md, locate the Phase 2 Step 4 Approval Gate HARD-GATE block. Insert the new sub-section AFTER the HARD-GATE prerequisite checklist and BEFORE the "Present the validated spec..." instruction.

### Gate logic to add

#### External Dependencies Contradiction Gate

Before presenting the approval gate options, when planning.external_dependency_block_enabled is on:

1. Read the ## External Dependencies block from the current epic spec (loaded or drafted in Phase 1).
2. Scan each block entry for contradictions: an entry where handling=claude_auto AND claude_has_access is in {no, unknown}.
3. If any contradiction is found:
   - Do NOT present the approval gate options.
   - Emit a diagnostic naming the contradicting entry:
     ```
     Approval gate blocked: External Dependency "[name]" is declared handling=claude_auto but claude_has_access=[no|unknown].
     Resolve this contradiction before the gate can open:
     - Option 1: Set handling=user_manual (mark as manual step for sprint)
     - Option 2: Confirm claude_has_access=yes if you have verified access
     ```
   - Wait for the practitioner to resolve the contradiction (edit the block entry), then re-run this gate check.
4. For each entry where verification_command is omitted:
   - Verify the entry has a non-empty justification field (already required by the schema from bec5-7f84/Task 2).
   - Add a confirmation_token_required: true marker to the entry's in-spec representation.
   - Note: this marker is consumed by sprint (story 9e66-3e5d) at pause-handshake time.
5. If planning.external_dependency_block_enabled is off: skip this entire gate section and proceed to approval gate presentation as before (baseline behavior).

### Structural markers required (for structural boundary tests in Task 1)
The SKILL.md amendment must contain:
- A sub-section heading: "### External Dependencies Contradiction Gate" (within the Step 4 block)
- A reference to confirmation_token_required marker propagation
- A reference to planning.external_dependency_block_enabled flag check

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md: add the gate sub-section as described above

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] SKILL.md contains the External Dependencies Contradiction Gate sub-section heading
  Verify: grep -q '### External Dependencies Contradiction Gate' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate section references planning.external_dependency_block_enabled flag
  Verify: grep -q 'planning.external_dependency_block_enabled' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate section references confirmation_token_required marker
  Verify: grep -q 'confirmation_token_required' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate section references the contradiction condition (claude_auto and no/unknown)
  Verify: grep -q 'claude_auto' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Structural-boundary tests from Task 1 (62f4-fe71) now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-brainstorm-external-dep-contradiction-gate.sh
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh passes (no dead path references introduced)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/scripts/dso check-referential-integrity.sh 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] check-shim-refs.sh passes (no direct plugin script paths introduced without shim-exempt annotation)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/scripts/dso check-shim-refs.sh 2>/dev/null || true
